channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Africa Day 2026: Recalling Nigeria’s Pan-African Role and Responsibilities
item.description: This article reflects on Nigeria’s historical and moral responsibilities to the African continent as the world marks Africa Day 2026. It revisits Nigeria’s early diplomatic and ideological positions a...

item.title: Cedric Kaze says Kaizer Chiefs have laid a foundation for future success ahead of season review
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs co-coach Cedric Kaze believes the club has made meaningful progress during the recently concluded Betway Premiership season, despite ending the campaign without silverware. Chiefs finish...

item.title: Brandi Glanville discusses health concerns and possible throat infection linked to ringworm exposure
item.description: Brandi Glanville, known for her role on The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills, has shared concerns that she may have contracted a fungal infection commonly referred to as ringworm in her throat, which ...

item.title: Trump pursues high-risk diplomatic exit strategy amid Iran conflict tensions
item.description: This Washington Post opinion piece by David Ignatius examines the Trump administration’s efforts to find a way out of escalating tensions and conflict involving Iran. According to the analysis, Presid...

item.title: South-West ADC Leaders Endorse Hayatu-Deen Ahead of Presidential Primary
item.description: Leaders of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) in Nigeria’s South-West region have publicly declared their support for presidential aspirant Mohammed Hayatu-Deen ahead of the party’s presidential pr...

item.title: Majority of Filipinos express support for defending Philippine territory, OCTA survey finds
item.description: An OCTA Research survey has found that a strong majority of adult Filipinos support the government’s efforts to defend the country’s territory and sovereign rights, including areas in the West Philipp...

item.title: Dreamie alarm clock helps users reduce phone use in bed with podcast-enabled sleep features

item.title: Two Killed in Road Crash Involving Car and Motorcycle in Masasi
item.description: Two people have lost their lives following a serious road accident involving a car and a motorcycle in Masasi District, located in the Mtwara Region in southeastern Tanzania. The crash has added fresh...

item.title: Jester Naefe and Her Rise as a Star of 1950s German-Language Cinema
item.description: Jester Naefe was an Austrian actress born in Vienna in 1924 who rose to prominence in the 1950s as one of the most recognizable faces of German-language cinema. Known for her elegance, charm, and expr...

item.title: Oil prices fall as US-Iran peace negotiations ease concerns over Strait of Hormuz disruption

item.title: Aisha Yesufu Says Her Focus Na NDC Ticket And FCT Voters Ahead Of 2027 Election
item.description: Activist and FCT senatorial aspirant Aisha Yesufu don talk say she no see FCT Minister Nyesom Wike as her direct political opponent ahead of the 2027 general election. During interview for Sunday Poli...

item.title: UK set for record-breaking May heat as temperatures reach mid-30s
item.description: The United Kingdom is facing an exceptional spell of hot weather, with forecasters warning that Monday could bring the hottest May day on record. Temperatures are expected to climb as high as 34C, sur...

item.description: According to a report by The Associated Press, a fatal shooting occurred near a security checkpoint close to the White House, leaving a bystander in serious condition. The incident prompted an immedia...

item.title: The turbulent final collaboration between Werner Herzog and Klaus Kinski during Cobra Verde (1987)
